Uses of Interface
recoder.util.Order

Packages that use Order
Package
Description
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.abstraction
This package contains the meta model abstractions as used by the semantical services.
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.util
This package provides basic data types and algorithms.

  • Uses of Order in recoder.util

    Classes in recoder.util that implement Order
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    Order.CustomLexicalOrder
    Custom lexical order implementation comparing objects by comparison of a unicode string mapping.
    static class 
    Order.Identity
    Identity order implementation comparing objects by address.
    static class 
    Order.Lexical
    Lexical order implementation comparing objects by their unicode string representations.
    static class 
    Order.Natural
    Natural order implementation using the inherited default methods.
    Fields in recoder.util declared as Order
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Order
    Order.IDENTITY
    Identity order relation object based on the objects' identities.
    static final Order
    Order.LEXICAL
    Lexical order relation object based on the objects' textual representation.
    static final Order
    Order.NATURAL
    Natural order relation object based on the objects' natural hash codes.
